notes: Load the larger recovery payload at 0x20001000 through the debugger before starting the seed.
Write the handoff block at 0x20000800 as: magic, payload_base, payload_size, payload_crc32.
Set MSP from the first word in the seed image and PC from the second word in the seed image.
For each row, add all bytes and keep the low 8 bits for S. XOR all bytes for X.
Verify each row before entry, then verify HASH32 after reconstructing the full image.
If the handoff block is invalid or the payload CRC32 does not match, the seed traps in a bkpt loop.
The seed is debugger-first in this profile. It does not require UART for initial ingress.
